MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-02-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-02-2015 Off Calendar

Motion For Leave To File An Amended Answer To Plaintiff'S First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-30-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Erin Thompson's Motion For Leave To File An Amended Answer To Plaintiff'S First Amended Complaint is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Amended Answer
Off Calendar Jan-30-2015 Off Calendar

DEFENDANT ERIN THOMPSON'S Motion For Leave To File Amended Answer is taken off calendar as a duplicate entry. (302/EHG)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-27-2015 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-29-2014 Set For Trial On Feb-02-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-09-2014 Set For Trial On Dec-15-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar May-28-2014 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2014 Continued To May-28-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-20-2014 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ERIN THOMPSON'S demurrer to the breach of fiduciary duty cause of action is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff fails to cite any facts or law demonstrating that the parties shared a fiduciary relationship. An employer/employee or principal/agent relationship, standing alone, does not create a fiduciary relationship. See Odorizzi v. Bloomfield School Dist. (1966) 246 Cal.App.2d 123, 129. Plaintiff does not allege facts showing that it reposed trust and confidence in defendant. If plaintiff relies on paragraph 5 of the parties' employment contract (trade secrets), then plaintiff can only allege a claim under the Uniform Trade Secrets Act because that Act preempts all common law claims. Plaintiff's reference to paragraph 9 of the parties' agreement (noncompetition) does not show the existence of a fiduciary relationship. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2014 Continued To Apr-16-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-06-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ERIN THOMPSON's DEMURRER to the first cause of action on the grounds of uncertainty is overruled. Defendant's demurrer to the second cause of action is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff is given 10 days leave to plead facts, it if it can do so in good faith, that establish the existence of a fiduciary relationship. Defendant's request to strike punitive damages cannot be the subject of a demurrer, and, in any event, is not requested in the notice of hearing. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185
